name: API Rate Limits
summary: Documents the throttling limits for Flattrade pi API calls. The general "API RATE LIMIT" allows 40 requests per second and 200 requests per minute. A separate, stricter "ORDER API RATE LIMIT" applies to order-related endpoints at 10 requests per second and 40 requests per minute.
notes:
The focal section is "API RATE LIMIT": Per Second = 40, Per Minute = 200.

The page also shows an adjacent, distinct section "ORDER API RATE LIMIT" (separate ALL-CAPS title) which applies a tighter limit to order APIs: Per Second = 10, Per Minute = 40. This is a different section but is the related order-specific rate cap, included here for completeness.

Both tables have two columns: "Time Frame" and "Rate Limit", with rows "Per Second" and "Per Minute".

The page also contains unrelated neighbouring content (a "Scrip Groups" download list at the top, and the start of "CHANGE LOG" / "API & WEBSOCKET CONFIGURATION UPDATE" at the bottom) which is NOT part of the rate-limit section and is ignored.

This is an Info section: no HTTP method, path, URL, request/response, parameters, or sample blocks are provided.
issues: None. Both the page image and cleaned text are legible and agree on the numbers. Note that "API Rate Limits" (the focal-section name given) corresponds to the "API RATE LIMIT" table on the page; the page additionally distinguishes an "ORDER API RATE LIMIT" with different values (10/40).
